mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM xeus.crms_image_join
rqst_mgr_seq = #{rqstMgrSeq}::numeric
AND img_mgr_seq = #{imgMgrSeq}::numeric
mapper.update:
UPDATE xeus.crms_image_rqst
proc_stat_cd = #{procStatCd},
acpt_user_id = #{acptUserId},
acpt_dat = #{acptDat},
rejt_resn = #{rejtResn},
WHERE mgr_seq = #{mgrSeq}::numeric
UPDATE xeus.crms_image_rqst SET doc_no = #{docNo} WHERE mgr_seq = #{mgrSeq}::numeric
UPDATE xeus.crms_image_rqst SET doc_chng_yn = #{docChngYn} WHERE mgr_seq = #{mgrSeq}::numeric
